name: GKE Nodes Use Container-Optimized OS
description: GKE node pools should use Container-Optimized OS with containerd (cos_containerd) for optimal security and performance
remediation: Update the node pool to use COS_CONTAINERD image type
remediation_steps: Create a new node pool with image type cos_containerd
Migrate workloads to the new node pool
Note: Image type cannot be changed on existing node pools
